description_long: This is a slender folding knife featuring a single-edged, pointed blade with a matte black finish. The handle is ornately decorated with intricate gold patterns, giving it a luxurious and decorative appearance. The handle appears to be ergonomically contoured for grip, with a visible pivot point where the blade folds into the handle. The blade is relatively thin and tapers to a sharp tip, suitable for precision cutting tasks. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, emphasizing its compact and streamlined design. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal for the blade and possibly metal or composite for the handle, with decorative gold-colored detailing.
description: A slender folding knife with a black pointed blade and an ornate gold-patterned handle, designed for precision and style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blade and the gold-patterned handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the decorative handle profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade and the detailed gold handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the blade's taper and handle's contour.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, gold-patterned, ergonomic, metallic with decorative engravings
attribute_ornamentation: intricate gold patterns and engravings on the handle
